title: Cisco flags ongoing exploitation of two recently patched Catalyst SD-WAN flaws

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Cisco flags ongoing exploitation of two recently patched Cat
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/07
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '20.12.5.3'
            - '20.12.6.1'
            - '20.15.4.2'
            - '20.18.2.1'
            - '20.9.8.2'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 20.12.5.3 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:7634921; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.12.6.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:1944177; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.15.4.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:8574104; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.18.2.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:3151844; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.9.8.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:1554596; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 20.12.5.3 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:3106693; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.12.6.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:8882354; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.15.4.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:1308656; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.18.2.1 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:6759464; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 20.9.8.2 any (msg:"CDB APEX Cisco_flags_ongoing_exploitati"; sid:7766515; rev:1;)
